title: AI Law Tracker:  Know if AI laws apply to your business — in 2 minutes | Product Hunt
excerpt: AI regulations are here — Illinois, California, Texas and 14+ US states have passed AI laws covering hiring, marketing, and customer data. Fines up to $10M. AI Law Tracker gives small businesses a fast answer: 4-question quiz, instant risk score, jurisdiction-specific compliance kit. Launch Month pricing (90% off): → Compliance Kit — $5 (normally $49) → Pro Monitor — $10/mo (normally $99) → Enterprise — $20/mo (normally $199) Free to start.

sentences.zh: 人工智能法规已出台——伊利诺伊州、加利福尼亚州、德克萨斯州和美国 14 个以上州已通过涵盖招聘、营销和客户数据的人工智能法律。
罚款最高可达 1000 万美元。
